name: Convenience of the Employer Lodging Exclusion

eligibility.description: Lodging must be on the business premises, for the employer's convenience, and required as a condition of employment.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Employees can exclude the value of employer-provided lodging if it is on the business premises and the employee is required to accept it as a condition of employment.
